note: reduced eval budget (N=4000; the degree-6 icosahedral gradient is ~50x costlier per step than the polynomial families). The reduced run flagged one candidate at lambda1~0.065 under a short certification, but under the STANDARD long integrator (same as all other groups) it gives lambda1=0.0143 < 0.02 threshold, and its support is off-center and anisotropic (symmetry-broken, a-coefficient ~0). The obstruction is budget-independent (T and O give the floor at the full N=12000 budget under the identical irreducibility mechanism).
